tasks.subject: Task 1: Repo hygiene — untrack tsbuildinfo and .eml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove `apps/console/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` and the `.eml` runtime file from git tracking; add `apps/*/var/` to root `.gitignore`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.gitignore` (root)
- Git: `git rm --cached apps/console/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`
- Git: `git rm --cached apps/console/var/mailstore/.../1778486139520-5dead6c33f1ee8a3.eml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git ls-files | grep -E "tsbuildinfo|\.eml$"` returns empty
- [ ] Root `.gitignore` contains `apps/*/var/`
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes

**Verify:** `git ls-files | grep -E "tsbuildinfo|\.eml$"` → empty output

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "git ls-files | grep -E 'tsbuildinfo|\\.eml$'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git ls-files returns empty for tsbuildinfo and .eml patterns", "apps/*/var/ is in root .gitignore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remove dead SettingsModal from webmail Sidebar
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the never-shown `SettingsModal` from `Sidebar.tsx` and remove the now-unused `SettingsModal.tsx` / `SettingsModalContent.tsx` files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/webmail/src/components/sidebar/useSidebarFolders.ts`
- Modify: `apps/webmail/src/components/Sidebar.tsx`
- Delete: `apps/webmail/src/components/SettingsModal.tsx`
- Delete: `apps/webmail/src/components/SettingsModalContent.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] SettingsModal.tsx and SettingsModalContent.tsx are deleted
- [ ] useSidebarFolders no longer exports showSettings/setShowSettings
- [ ] `pnpm --dir apps/webmail type-check` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir apps/webmail type-check` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/webmail/src/components/sidebar/useSidebarFolders.ts", "apps/webmail/src/components/Sidebar.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir apps/webmail type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SettingsModal.tsx deleted", "SettingsModalContent.tsx deleted", "type-check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Restructure SECURITY_REVIEW.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md` so it accurately reflects what is implemented vs. deferred.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Sections: Implemented Controls, Accepted Risk, Post-Release Hardening
- [ ] All 8 audit items appear under Implemented Controls
- [ ] Last updated = 2026-05-28

**Verify:** `grep '## ' docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '## ' docs/SECURITY_REVIEW.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Implemented Controls section present", "Accepted Risk section present", "Post-Release Hardening section present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Decompose spam-filter page (1273 lines)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Split spam-filter/page.tsx into types, data hook, and three focused UI components.

- [ ] `pnpm --dir apps/console type-check` passes
